case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK VS. MICHAEL J SILVERFOOTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST; & WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERFOOTE, MICHAEL J DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK SERVED MAR-13-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERFOOTE, MICHAEL J
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $268.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SILVERFOOTE, MICHAEL J
DECLARATION OF DARLA GENZ RE: CCP 585(A) - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVERFOOTE, MICHAEL J $8,469.55 PRINCIPAL, $1,916.67 INTEREST, $268.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,654.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
